title: Fix reversed Post/Comment association direction
prompt: The file test_fixtures/post_comment_wrong_direction.ex has the foreign-key side flipped: Post has belongs_to :comment and Comment has has_many :posts. Fix so that Post has has_many :comments and Comment has belongs_to :post (the FK lives on the comments table, which is the many side). Also add a migration that creates the comments table with a references(:posts, on_delete: :delete_all) foreign key. Write Post to lib/my_app/blog/post.ex, Comment to lib/my_app/blog/comment.ex, migration to priv/repo/migrations/20260411900000_create_comments.exs.
tier_rationale: Requires recognizing the FK-side invariant and inverting both ends of the relationship. Sonnet often fixes only one side.
research_citation: Ecto.Schema docs: 'Indicates a one-to-one or many-to-one association with another schema. You should use belongs_to in the table that contains the foreign key.'
